sections.nrsv: But I say to you, Love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you, so that you may be children of your Father in heaven.
sections.lamsa: But I say to you, Love your enemies, bless those who curse you, do good to those who hate you, and pray for those who persecute you and despitefully use you.
sections.hart: But I tell you, love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you, so you may be true children of your Father in heaven.
sections.commentary: Love Your Enemies is radical compassion. Esoteric: The enemy is the shadow within.

sections.nrsv: In everything do to others as you would have them do to you; for this is the law and the prophets.
sections.lamsa: Everything, therefore, that you wish men to do to you, do also to them, for this is the law and the prophets.
sections.hart: Treat others as you would like them to treat you; this sums up the Law and the Prophets.
sections.commentary: Golden Rule is the core of ethics. Esoteric: All is one; what you do returns to you.

sections.nrsv: So do not worry about tomorrow, for tomorrow will bring worries of its own. Today’s trouble is enough for today.
sections.lamsa: Therefore do not worry for tomorrow; tomorrow will look after itself. Sufficient for the day is its own trouble.
sections.hart: Do not worry about tomorrow; tomorrow will take care of itself. Each day has enough trouble of its own.
sections.commentary: Do Not Worry is trust in providence. Esoteric: Presence is the gateway to peace.

sections.nrsv: Jesus said to him, 'I am the way, and the truth, and the life. No one comes to the Father except through me.'
sections.lamsa: Jesus said to him, I am the way, and the truth, and the life; no man comes to my Father except by me.
sections.hart: I am the way, the truth, and the life. No one comes to the Father except through me.
sections.commentary: I Am the Way is the path of union. Esoteric: The 'way' is the inner Christ.
